cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which statement is true based on the passage. Let me go through each option one by one. First, the passage starts by talking about the collapse of the wild salmon run. The Sacramento River salmon run is usually productive but last fall only about 90,000 adult salmon returned, which is the second lowest on record. So option A says "Last fall, there was the second lowest number of grown salmon returning on record." That seems correct because the passage directly states that. But I should check the other options too. Option B: "The salmon migrates to the ocean when they grow up." The passage says wild salmon are born in streams, migrate to the ocean when they're juveniles. So it's when they're young, not when they grow up. So B is incorrect. Option C: "The farm-raised salmon is not as delicious and nutrients as the wild salmon." The passage mentions there will be abundant farm-raised salmon but doesn't compare their taste or nutrition.
